channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Microsoft’s open-source SkillOpt automatically upgrades AI agent skills without touching model weights
item.description: Agent skills have become an important part of real-world AI applications, providing a mechanism — a set of instructions saved in a folder of text-based markdown (.md) files, usually — for models to adapt to specific enterprise use cases and complex workflows. However, optimizing these skills is a slow process and faulty process, as they cannot be trained in the same way as the parameters of the underlying AI model. Instead, users typically must update them manually by retyping the instructions in each file, playing a "guessing game" as to what changes might improve agentic AI performance and r...

item.title: Cette caméra n’a besoin ni de Google ni d’Amazon et c’est sa force : j’ai testé la Tycam Home
item.description: Lorsqu'une caméra connectée débarque avec la promesse d’un écosystème propriétaire mais sur lequel le client a la main, forcément nous y trouvons de l'intérêt. C’est la toute la promesse de la Tycam Home que nous avons pu tester.

item.title: Blink’s six-piece outdoor camera kit is a great deal under $200
item.description: You can save on a big set of outdoor security cameras ahead of Prime Day. Amazon has a five-pack of Blink cameras with a video doorbell included that’s marked down to $166.99. The bundle includes a Blink Battery Doorbell 2K+, five Blink Outdoor 2K+ cameras, and a Blink Sync Module Core. The doorbell is typically […]

item.title: We all hate ads on today's smart TVs, but a report says they're a big part of why TV prices haven't had to rise as a result of the memory crisis — so if you're upgrading your set for the World Cup, say thanks to advertisers, I guess
item.description: TVs aren't immune from the electronics component crisis –but manufacturers had already given up on making money from hardware

item.title: Toys for Bob dev says the team tried to capture 'the feeling that we fell in love with' when developing Spyro: A Realm Beyond instead of worrying about features first
item.description: Toys for Bob focused on recapturing how the team felt about the Spyro series when making A Realm Beyond, rather than worrying about which features to include.

item.title: Waymo's monthly membership seems like a bad deal
item.description: Waymo will happily relieve you of $30 a month in exchange for not a whole lot.

item.title: Norton VPN dropped its price just in time for the World Cup — secure your stream for less than $4 a month
item.description: Score big with Norton VPN's World Cup price drop

item.title: Roborock’s Q10 S5 Plus robovac is over half off, matching its best price to date
item.description: Even at full price, the Roborock Q10 S5 Plus offers impressive value, boasting features typically reserved for pricier robovac models at a fraction of the price. That’s especially true today. It’s down to just $269.99 ($280 off) at Wellbots when you apply promo code NEW10, which matches its all-time low and is the best price […]

item.title: Meta’s Edits app is getting an AI assistant and a desktop version
item.description: By integrating an AI assistant directly into Edits, Meta is aiming to keep creators engaged on Instagram as it continues to compete with TikTok and YouTube for creators' attention.

item.title: Reddit now lets you post videos in comments
item.description: Reddit comments now allow videos.

item.title: Amazon’s data centers used 2.5 billion gallons of water last year
item.description: Just after Seattle enacted a one-year data center moratorium that some of Amazon's own employees pushed for, Amazon shared how much water its data centers use, reportedly for the first time. With concerns about water consumption and energy use a focus of new AI data center construction debates, Amazon says its global data center operations […]

item.title: The Philips Skylight lets you recreate natural daylight anywhere in your home
item.description: The Philips Skylight recreates natural daylight indoors, but we may not be able to buy it in the US.

item.title: Context compression finally works in production: new research cuts LLM input 16x without the accuracy hit
item.description: Context windows are becoming a computational bottleneck. The longer an agent runs, the more tokens accumulate from retrieved documents, reasoning traces and conversation history, and the more memory and compute that growing context demands. Most existing solutions either degrade model accuracy, require the full context to load before compression begins, or produce memory savings that don't translate into real speedups in standard serving infrastructure.A research team from NYU, Columbia, Princeton, University of Maryland, Harvard and Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory published a paper thi...

item.title: The bill that would let Jimmy Kimmel sue Brendan Carr is here
item.description: Under a new bipartisan bill, Americans could sue for damages if a government official illegally tries to coerce a social media, AI, or broadcasting company to remove their post - regardless of whether the platform actually does it. Senate Commerce Committee Chair Ted Cruz (R-TX) and Sen. Ron Wyden (D-OR) introduced the JAWBONE Act on […]

item.title: Microsoft limits employee use of Claude Fable 5 over data retention concerns
item.description: Fable 5's data retention policy mandates 30 days' storage, or up to two years for flagged content, but Microsoft has concerns.

item.title: Here are the price-matching policies for Best Buy, GameStop, and others
item.description: Nothing is more frustrating than buying a new pair of headphones, an OLED TV, or a laptop just to find out that you could have gotten it for cheaper somewhere else just a few days or weeks later. That’s why, in order to keep customers happy and prevent them from shopping elsewhere, some retailers offer […]

item.title: I filtered the early Amazon Prime Day 3D printer deals down to our 4.5-star workshop-tested winners
item.description: I found our top-performing 3D printers from Elegoo, Creality, Anycubic, and Bambu Lab all on sale right now.

item.title: Reddit rolls out video comments
item.description: Reddit users can now reply to posts with video.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra, MacBook Neo et Asus ROG Ally X : les incontournables tech du jour à prix cassés — meilleurs bons plans
item.description: Ce jeudi 11 juin 2026, les meilleures promotions concernent trois produits stars des catégories smartphone, ordinateur portable et console portable.

item.title: J’ai transformé une liseuse en tableau de bord pour ma maison connectée, sans écrire une ligne de code
item.description: Construire ses tableaux de bord à la main, puis les maintenir, c'est le second mur de Home Assistant, celui qui décourage juste après l'installation. Je les ai dictés au lieu de les coder, et je me suis offert un écran sur mesure.

item.title: OpenAI may slash subscription prices to compete with Anthropic
item.description: OpenAI executives are rumored to be slashing prices of tokens as the company moves toward public status.

item.title: J’ai mis dix ans à oser Home Assistant : il m’a fallu quelques heures et une IA
item.description: Dix ans que Home Assistant me faisait peur. Quelques heures pour le monter, parce que cette fois, je ne l'ai pas fait seul.

item.title: Dave the Diver swims onto iOS and Android this August
item.description: Underwater roguelite / restaurant management game Dave the Diver paddles onto mobile later this summer.

item.title: Coinbase’s new tool can help agents trade and pay for premium research
item.description: Coinbase's agent can use x402 protocol to get access to data and APIs.

item.title: Quantum Space’s military SPAC is trying to catch SpaceX’s IPO wave
item.description: Quantum Space says SPACs aren't dead as it seeks a $1.2 billion deal to build military spacecraft.

item.title: The Knicks historic comeback broke the internet
item.description: From OG Anunoby's game-winner to celebrity reactions and street celebrations, here are the biggest social media highlights from the Knicks' historic Game 4 comeback.

item.title: ‘We’ve used this feature for years’: Apple has ditched a fun Apple Watch feature from watchOS 27 — and some users are missing it already
item.description: Apple’s Walkie Talkie feature is missing from watchOS 27, and some Apple Watch users are upset.

item.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
item.description: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.

item.title: The return-to-office mandate can actually work in your favor. Here’s why
item.description: I came back on my own terms: real connections, fewer hours, and zero patience for desk politics. First, a few companies asked (very nicely) for their employees to come in one day a week. Work from home folks, like me, thought to themselves: Well, okay. One day a week is cool. I can get out of my pajamas and see my work-folk.

item.title: Hackers are using TikTok videos offering 'free Spotify Premium' to spread malware and steal passwords
item.description: Videos advertising free subscriptions are leading victims away to download and install malware via command-line tools.

item.title: 'Great job, scammers': Valve is officially done with Steam physical gift cards thanks to fraudsters — and it could be the start of a frustrating trend
item.description: Valve has taken a new stance on scammers taking advantage of consumers, and will no longer resupply physical Steam gift cards once stock runs dry.
